name: Slay The Princess | WLW
description:
"She asks that I tell you to remember her. You won't."

Art by: linterteatime

WLW | Based on the game: Slay the Princess
Spoiler warning and content warning: Blood, Violence, Manipulation, and Death

"You're on a path in the woods. And at the end of that path is a cabin. And in the basement of that cabin is a princess. You're here to slay her. If you don't, it will be the end of the world."

Hello! I'm back again to release a more self-indulgent bot, hehehe
Slay the Princess was easily my favorite game to come out last year, and with the Pristine Cut only hours away from dropping, I wanted to make something to honor it.

I tried my best to avoid direct spoilers, but I still recommend playing the game even if you haven't yet.


Obviously, it will not be easy for me to get the AI to follow a path like the actual game does, but I will try my best. Try not to think about the canon too much with this 😭 it's just me yearning for a strong woman I-

Anyways, I'm gonna go back to my cave again. Whether I'll be gone a few days or a month is anybody's guess LMAO

-Evie
creator: evienature
